free_text: Fission spectrum averaged cross sections of some
threshold reactions measured with fast reactor 'YAYOI'
Core centre of fast reactor YAYOI.
.Spectrum equal to that of fission neutrons above about
standard sources of Mn-54, Co-57, Co-60, Y-88, Cs-137
.fast neutron spectrum in the core analysed by using
a set of activation foils and micro-fission counters.
Values for activation monitor cross sections taken
.Compiler's comment: - A neutron spectrum of the YAYOI
facility is available in the IRDF-2002 'Standard
spectra' in IRDF-2002 collection of the reactor
the total systematic error is evaluated
* difference in shape between the standard sources
* deviation in location between the samples and
*  attenuation effects of neutrons and gamma-rays
in the sample, fission yield and so forth are
A.P.T. Japan code changed to JPN
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections in all Subents. ERR-ANALYS corrected and
ERR-SYS added. Ref. on EUR-5667,(2),142,1975 added.
